subcodes.first_line: Fix thy gaze upon this blessed Word, which, like unto a lamp, shineth in the darkness of the world, and hold fast unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این کلمه مبارکه که بمنزله سراج است در ظلمت عالم ناظر باش و باو متمسک شو
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @fire and light; fire and water, @being a source of light; guidance
